rows.notes: Clear centered page title at the top. Ink and lettering legible; no amounts present.
Description clear. Vertical ruling lines for £ s d unambiguous. Numbers read as 3 | 16 | 8 with good contrast; values are in valid ranges.
Description letters partially unclear (interpreted as 'Coll Adis yt.'). Amount columns aligned; pounds and shillings clearly '0' and pence looks like '8' but ink slightly faint on the pence digit.
Second similar "Coll Adis" line; description handwriting matches previous line but not perfectly clear. Amounts align to columns and read 0 | 18 | 0; shillings within valid range.
Description is partially smudged; read as 'Coll Smith: Division' (uncertain word after Smith). Amounts read 4 | 12 | 4; column alignment clear.
Description 'Coll Ball' legible. Amounts read 0 | 12 | 6; digits are crisp and within valid ranges.
Abbreviated description 'Coll S. P. B.' clear. Amounts 0 | 8 | 2 well aligned and legible.
Description 'Mayor's Capons' readable. Amounts 0 | 14 | 0 clear; shillings in valid range.
Surname looks like 'Hastings' but first name could be 'Carrie' or 'Curia' — chosen 'Carrie Hastings' as best visual match. Amounts read 0 | 1 | 8; pence digit clear though the script is small.

Description contains multiple names/abbrev. 'Boxer: Kidding; J. Newington & Merch.' is an interpretation of cramped handwriting. Amount columns aligned; pence looks like 11 but ink blot makes final digit slightly uncertain.
Description 'Easter Syndals Hto' (syndals / sinew?) is uncertain due to unusual spelling; amounts 1 | 10 | 4 read from clear vertical alignment but description uncertain.
Single-word description looks like 'Cope' or 'Coupe'; chosen 'Cope'. Pounds column clearly '2'; pence '4' is a smaller digit but aligned with pence column.
Handwriting ambiguous — reads as 'Lobric' or 'Lohec'. Chosen reading is uncertain. Amounts 1 | 6 | 8 but the shillings/pence digits are small and slightly faded.
Description likely 'Scull. & Sundays' or 'Sculls & Sundry' – interpreted as 'Sculls & Sundays'. Amounts read 0 | 2 | 0; alignment is clear though text ambiguous.
Description 'Cleaning Chap. Oct. 5' legible. Amounts read 0 | 2 | 0; digits clear and consistent with column lines.
Long description abbreviated 'Pro Curatoris ad Sept. Annual' — phrasing approximated but reading of amounts 23 | 0 | 0 is clear and columns unambiguous.
Subsidiary line 'ad Sept. Misc' (appears immediately under previous); amounts 28 | 0 | 0 clearly aligned. Description wording inferred from abbreviation but consistent with page.
Short word looks like 'Torson' or 'Imson' — uncertain. Amounts 0 | 13 | 4 read from columns but pence digit is slightly smudged leading to moderate uncertainty.
Read as 'Supervisior Adjt.' or 'Supervisor Adft' — interpreted as 'Supervisor Adjt.' Amount 4 | 0 | 0 clear in columns; description letters somewhat cramped.
Word looks like 'Janitor' (clear). Amounts 1 | 14 | 8 readable though pence digit is small; values valid.
Handwritten Latin-like word 'Bibliothecario' or 'Bibliothecario' — letters partly ornate. Amounts 0 | 13 | 4 aligned but pence is slightly faded.
Abbreviated description likely 'Bil: lect Oct. 5' (bishop lecture?). Amount 0 | 2 | 0 clear and columns unambiguous.
Description 'Sermon Easter' readable. Amount 1 | 0 | 0 is clear and well aligned.
Single word 'Concession' appears under a short rule; letters slightly faded. Amount 1 | 0 | 0 legible.
Place-name 'Southwerkinton' is a best-effort reading (handwriting unclear); 'Vicars ad Sept Annual' inferred from abbreviations. Amount 10 | 0 | 0 clear.
Subsidiary line under the previous entry reading 'ad Sept. Misc'. Amounts 10 | 0 | 0 clearly aligned with columns.
Description 'Bedel of Beggars' readable though 'Bedel' archaic. Amount 1 | 3 | 0 legible in columns.

rows.description: Plate excise due Lady day last
rows.notes: Line 'Plate excise due Lady day last' is fairly clear. Amounts 5 | 15 | 0 read cleanly and align with ruling lines.
Final total at bottom right reads '100 2 11½' (pence halfpenny indicated by the small loop). Column alignment and numerals are clear; fraction interpreted as 0.5.
